title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
